text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're facing Special Week head-on. The
day of the spring Tenno Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm going to do it. Just watch and you'll see.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I've put myself through hell. But if it all pays off...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Cafe, you're on fire! But don't go think'n you've
won it just yet!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I had some huge helpings of carrots, p'tatoes and
raw whitebait, so I've got a whole lot of energy to
run on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe and Special Week are talking
past each other. That said...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Good grief. The more she riles herself up, the
higher a toll her body pays...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But how will her toenails and sesamoid bones hold
up? We've managed so far with your dedicated
care and my scientific treatments.
choice_data_list: Will this race be tough on her?
Will this race be tough on her?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: No, I think she'll get through today just fine. Beyond that, who can say. The real issue will be...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Her motivation. Her core's not a problem
anymore, but there's a new poison in the mix...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Plan B. We may have gone too far down a narrow
path...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Manhattan Cafe, I feel unsettled by the
intensity of her expression.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I thought she'd forgive me, I'd say it. ...I'd tell
her to stop chasing after her friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But that's the one thing I can't say. It was our first
promise—the one we made on the day we entered
our contract.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For now, I can only pray she comes back
uninjured.
